modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: C drive is full due to Temp folder cab files

full_description_text: The user called in saying their C drive is full. They mentioned that the C:\windows\Temp folder has a lot of cab files in it. It seems like this is causing some issues with their system.
short_description: C drive is full due to Temp folder cab files
description: The user called in saying their C drive is full. They mentioned that the C:\windows\Temp folder has a lot of cab files in it. It seems like this is causing some issues with their system.
